title: Operations Visibility Blockers Summary Runtime Consumption Execution
objective: Land the remaining adjacent populated Operations Visibility runtime-consumption slice by exposing a read-only `v_blockers_summary` seam and mounting the fifth governed browser consumer in `apps/operations-web`.
dependency_note: Packet 052 closed the grouped-category seam and left `v_blockers_summary` as the last populated adjacent view in the live `09` Operations Visibility set.
execution_steps: Confirm `public.v_blockers_summary` returns live rows in the current dataset.
Add a read-only `GET /api/v1/ops/blockers-summary` seam against `public.v_blockers_summary` in `apps/control-plane-api`.
Validate the seam with a focused FastAPI TestClient file covering routing, shape, and limit forwarding.
Mount the fifth governed browser consumer in `apps/operations-web` and validate it with the app-local TypeScript compiler.
constraints: Do not reopen direct browser-side Supabase admission.
Keep the slice bounded to blocker aggregation consumption and its direct authority surfaces.
Do not fabricate consumers for adjacent views that remain empty in the live dataset.

adjacent_view_selection.selection_reason: Blockers summary was the final adjacent populated view after Packet 052.

execution_evidence.diagnostics_status: No editor errors on touched backend and frontend files

execution_rationale: After Packet 052, blockers summary was the only remaining adjacent populated view, so landing it closes the truthful live-consumer set for the current `09` tranche dataset.
The live sample showed a stable grouped-note shape that could be surfaced without widening authority or inventing client-side database access.
Deferring the remaining empty views preserves the lane's truthfulness by tying runtime consumers to live data rather than schema existence alone.
next_packet_candidate: Hold empty Operations Visibility seams until live data exists or resume the next highest-truth bounded Olares lane
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as the direct adjacent-consumer follow-on after Packet 052. Packet 053 selected `v_blockers_summary` as the final populated live seam, landed the read-only backend route plus focused tests, mounted the fifth governed browser consumer, and validated the slice with pytest plus the app-local TypeScript compiler.
